name: Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport
address: Jalan Airport Ngurah Rai No 7 Tuban - Kuta, Bali Indonesia, Kuta, Bali, Indonesia
description:
Khám Phá Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport - Nơi Nghỉ Dưỡng Tiện Nghi Gần Sân Bay Bali

Nằm chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố Bali khoảng 3.5 km và chỉ mất chưa đến 5 phút lái xe để đến sân bay Ngurah Rai, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport là điểm dừng chân lý tưởng dành cho du khách muốn kết hợp sự tiện lợi và thoải mái trong chuyến đi của mình. Khách sạn được xây dựng từ năm 2014 và đã trải qua đợt nâng cấp lớn vào năm 2016, đảm bảo mang đến trải nghiệm lưu trú hiện đại, tiện nghi và đẳng cấp.

Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport mở cửa đón khách từ 3 giờ chiều và phục vụ khách đến lúc 12 giờ trưa ngày hôm sau, phù hợp cho các chuyến bay sớm hoặc muộn. Đặc biệt, khách sạn còn có chính sách thân thiện với gia đình khi cho phép trẻ em từ 6 đến 10 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, giúp các gia đình tiết kiệm và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn. Với hệ thống phòng ốc đa dạng và dịch vụ chu đáo, nơi đây hứa hẹn mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời cho mọi khách hàng.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport, du khách không chỉ tận hưởng dịch vụ lưu trú chất lượng mà còn được trải nghiệm các tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng. Quầy bar sang trọng là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá Bali, với các loại thức uống phong phú và không khí ấm cúng, thân thiện. Bên cạnh đó, các cửa hàng mua sắm ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn mang đến sự tiện lợi tối đa, giúp du khách dễ dàng tìm kiếm những món đồ lưu niệm độc đáo hoặc những mặt hàng cần thiết cho hành trình của mình. Với các tiện ích này, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport cam kết mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm giải trí thoải mái, phong phú ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Đẳng Cấp Tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Khách sạn Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport tự hào mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi thể thao hiện đại và thoải mái. Trung tâm thể hình của khách sạn được trang bị đầy đủ các thiết bị tập luyện tiên tiến, giúp bạn duy trì phong độ và sức khỏe trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Dù bạn là người yêu thích tập gym hay đơn giản muốn giữ dáng, không gian này sẽ đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của bạn một cách chuyên nghiệp và tiện lợi.

Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn sở hữu hồ bơi ngoài trời rộng rãi, lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng không khí trong lành của Bali. Bạn có thể thả mình trong làn nước mát lạnh sau một ngày khám phá đảo hoặc đơn giản là thưởng thức những phút giây thư giãn bên gia đình và bạn bè trong khung cảnh tuyệt đẹp của hồ bơi. Đây chắc chắn sẽ là điểm đến lý tưởng để nâng cao trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng của bạn tại Bali.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi Tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport mang đến cho khách hàng một loạt tiện nghi hiện đại để đảm bảo kỳ nghỉ hoặc chuyến công tác của bạn thật thoải mái và thuận tiện. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là chuyên nghiệp, giúp bạn luôn giữ gìn trang phục sạch sẽ và tươm tất trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Dịch vụ phòng 24/7 đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu ăn uống và thư giãn ngay tại phòng, mang lại sự tiện lợi tối đa cho khách hàng bận rộn.

Ngoài ra, khách còn được an tâm với các biện pháp an toàn như hộp đựng đồ an toàn tại phòng. Wi-Fi miễn phí nhanh chóng và ổn định được cung cấp trong tất cả các phòng và khu vực công cộng, giúp khách dễ dàng kết nối và làm việc. Các dịch vụ tiện ích khác như lưu trữ hành lý, dọn phòng hàng ngày và các tủ đựng đồ an toàn tại khách sạn mang lại sự thoải mái, an tâm và thuận tiện tối đa trong suốt kỳ nghỉ hoặc chuyến công tác của bạn tại Bali.

Tiện Nghi Giao Thông Đặc Biệt tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport tự hào mang đến cho khách hàng sự tiện lợi tối đa với dịch vụ đỗ xe miễn phí ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn. Quý khách không cần lo lắng về vấn đề tìm chỗ đỗ xe hay chi phí phát sinh, giúp hành trình của bạn trở nên dễ dàng và thoải mái hơn bao giờ hết. Khu vực đỗ xe rộng rãi, an toàn và luôn sẵn sàng phục vụ mọi nhu cầu của khách.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Đẳng Cấp tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Khách sạn Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo với các tiện nghi hiện đại trong từng phòng. Bạn sẽ được tận hưởng không khí mát mẻ, dễ chịu nhờ hệ thống điều hòa nhiệt độ cao cấp, cùng với đó là các tiện ích như máy sấy tóc, truyền hình sắc nét và bộ dụng cụ pha cà phê/trà miễn phí để bắt đầu ngày mới thật sảng khoái. Phòng còn được trang bị tủ lạnh tiện lợi, giúp bạn giữ gìn thực phẩm và đồ uống tươi ngon trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình. Đặc biệt, các phòng đều có rèm cửa chống sáng, tạo không gian yên tĩnh, lý tưởng để nghỉ ngơi sau một ngày dài khám phá Bali.

Không gian phòng còn rộng rãi với khu vực sinh hoạt riêng biệt, mang lại cảm giác thoải mái và riêng tư tối đa. Các tiện nghi như đồ dùng vệ sinh cá nhân cao cấp, khăn tắm mềm mại, cùng với trà miễn phí và các đồ dùng cá nhân khác giúp bạn cảm thấy như đang ở nhà. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa tiện nghi hiện đại và thiết kế tinh tế, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport chắc chắn sẽ làm hài lòng mọi khách hàng khó tính nhất.

Trải Nghiệm Ẩm Thực Tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Không chỉ vậy, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày giúp duy trì sự sạch sẽ và gọn gàng cho không gian nghỉ ngơi của bạn, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng để thư giãn sau một ngày khám phá Bali. Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm ẩm thực tiện nghi, đa dạng và chất lượng cao, giúp quý khách có những phút giây thưởng thức ẩm thực thoải mái và trọn vẹn ngay tại khách sạn.

Các loại phòng đa dạng tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Bạn có thể chọn phòng King Guest rộng 30 mét vuông với giường King thoải mái hoặc phòng Twin Guest cùng diện tích với hai giường đơn, lý tưởng cho nhóm bạn hoặc gia đình nhỏ. Ngoài ra, các loại phòng có tầm nhìn ra hồ bơi như King Room With Pool View và Twin Room With Pool View mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời, giúp bạn thư giãn trong không gian riêng tư.

Đối với những khách muốn không gian rộng rãi hơn, phòng King One Bedroom Suite rộng 50 mét vuông hoặc Presidential Suite rộng 149 mét vuông sẽ mang đến sự sang trọng và tiện nghi tối đa. Ngoài ra, các lựa chọn phòng dành cho gia đình và phòng dễ tiếp cận cũng sẵn có, đảm bảo mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng đều được đáp ứng. Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng quy trình đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng và không gây phiền hà, giúp bạn có trải nghiệm đặt phòng thuận tiện để chuẩn bị cho kỳ nghỉ lý tưởng tại Bali.

Khám phá Kuta - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng ở Bali

Kuta, một trong những điểm đến nổi tiếng nhất ở Bali, Indonesia, là một thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với bãi biển tuyệt đẹp và không khí tươi mát. Với vị trí thuận lợi gần Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport, du khách có thể dễ dàng truy cập vào Kuta chỉ trong vài phút đi bộ.

Kuta nổi tiếng với bãi biển nguyên sơ, cát trắng và nước biển trong xanh. Du khách có thể thỏa sức tắm nắng, tắm biển và tham gia các hoạt động thể thao ngoài trời như lướt sóng, đi xe trượt cát và chèo thuyền buồm. Ngoài ra, Kuta cũng có nhiều quán bar, nhà hàng và cửa hàng mua sắm, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho du khách muốn khám phá văn hóa và ẩm thực đặc trưng của Bali.

Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng không gian xanh mát và yên tĩnh, Kuta cũng có nhiều công viên và khu vườn nổi tiếng. Du khách có thể tham quan công viên nước Waterbom Bali, công viên Garuda Wisnu Kencana và vườn Bali Bird Park để khám phá thiên nhiên đặc biệt của đảo Bali. Với vô số hoạt động và điểm tham quan hấp dẫn, Kuta là một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua khi du lịch đến Bali.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay gần Bali đến Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport tọa lạc ở Kuta, Bali, Indonesia, chỉ cách sân bay quốc tế Ngurah Rai khoảng 1,5 km. Để đến khách sạn này từ sân bay, có một số phương tiện bạn có thể lựa chọn.

Một lựa chọn phổ biến là đi bằng taxi hoặc xe đưa đón từ sân bay. Bạn có thể tìm thấy các dịch vụ taxi và xe đưa đón ở sảnh đến của sân bay. Đây là phương tiện thoải mái và thuận tiện để đến Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport. Nếu bạn muốn tiết kiệm hơn, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt công cộng. Xe buýt có lịch trình đến và đi từ sân bay đến Kuta và các vùng lân cận. Tuy nhiên, bạn cần kiểm tra lịch trình trước để đảm bảo rằng nó phù hợp với kế hoạch của bạn.

Nếu bạn muốn tự lái, bạn có thể thuê xe hoặc một chiếc xe máy để đến Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport. Sân bay có nhiều công ty cho thuê xe và xe máy để bạn lựa chọn. Điều này sẽ cho phép bạn tự do di chuyển và khám phá các điểm đến khác nhau xung quanh Bali.

Khám phá những điểm đến tuyệt vời gần Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Với vị trí thuận lợi, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport là điểm khởi đầu hoàn hảo để khám phá những điểm đến tuyệt vời xung quanh. Chỉ cách khách sạn một quãng đi bộ ngắn, du khách có thể đến Công viên Waterbom - một công viên nước vui nhộn và hấp dẫn với các trò chơi thú vị cho cả gia đình. Bãi biển Kuta cũng nằm gần đó, nơi du khách có thể tận hưởng ánh nắng vàng rực rỡ và thưởng thức những món ăn đặc trưng của vùng biển.

Nếu bạn muốn tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa Bali, hãy ghé thăm Tượng đài Vùng Không và Quảng trường Kuta. Đây là những điểm đến nổi tiếng, nơi bạn có thể khám phá những tác phẩm nghệ thuật độc đáo và tham gia vào các sự kiện văn hóa đặc sắc. Đối với những du khách yêu thích biển cả, Gilis Boat là điểm đến lý tưởng để khám phá những hòn đảo xinh đẹp và tham gia các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước. Đừng quên ghé thăm Biểu diễn nghệ thuật Musro Bali để trải nghiệm những màn trình diễn nghệ thuật độc đáo của đất nước này. Bên cạnh đó, trong vòng một quãng đi bộ, du khách có thể đến Royal Farma để tìm hiểu về các loại cây thuốc và trải nghiệm những liệu pháp truyền thống. Với vị trí thuận lợi, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport là nơi lý tưởng để khám phá những điểm đến tuyệt vời này.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng đặc biệt. Bạn có thể thưởng thức món Ayam Betutu Khas Gilimanuk tại nhà hàng cùng tên. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức món ăn hải sản ngon, hãy đến Warung Laota Tuban hay Warung Laota Sunset Road. Crumb & Coaster là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai yêu thích bánh ngọt và cà phê. Nếu bạn thích ẩm thực halal, hãy ghé qua Warung Makan Nikmat. Warung Babi Guling Bu Dayu Kencani là nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức món thịt lợn nướng đặc biệt. Warung Wardani Tuban và Warung Pink Tempong cung cấp các món ăn địa phương truyền thống. Bali Nikmat và Eat and Eat cung cấp nhiều lựa chọn ẩm thực đa dạng cho du khách. Với sự đa dạng và chất lượng của những nhà hàng này, bạn sẽ không bao giờ phải lo lắng về việc tìm kiếm một nơi để thưởng thức ẩm thực tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport.

Các điểm mua sắm xung quanh Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport nằm gần nhiều điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng. Du khách có thể tìm thấy những bộ đồ may sẵn tại Sweet Tailor hoặc Batik Danar Hadi, nơi cung cấp các sản phẩm thủ công độc đáo. Nếu bạn muốn tìm một món quà độc đáo, hãy ghé qua Yulia Silver Shop, nơi bán các món đồ bạc tinh xảo. KutaBEX và DFS Galleria cung cấp một trải nghiệm mua sắm sang trọng với nhiều thương hiệu nổi tiếng. Kingdom Leather and Tailor là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn sở hữu một chiếc áo da hoặc đặt may áo theo yêu cầu. Quiksilver là nơi tuyệt vời để mua sắm các sản phẩm thời trang biển. Nếu bạn muốn mua sắm quần áo, hãy ghé qua Rumah Kaos Agung Bali. Trans Studio Mall Bali là một trung tâm mua sắm lớn với nhiều cửa hàng và nhà hàng. Cuối cùng, Suri Shop là nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy các sản phẩm thủ công Bali độc đáo.

Giá trung bình phòng tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Với giá trung bình chỉ $57 mỗi đêm, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho khách du lịch muốn tiết kiệm chi phí ở Bali. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại thành phố này là $199, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport cung cấp một giá trị vượt trội. Với mức giá hợp lý như vậy, du khách có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ chất lượng cao và tiện nghi hiện đại tại khách sạn này mà không cần lo lắng về ngân sách.

Nhân viên rất nhiệt tình và dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay tốt

Tôi rất hài lòng với sự nhiệt tình của nhân viên và dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay tại Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport. Họ đã giúp đỡ tôi rất nhiều trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Bể bơi tại khách sạn thật tuyệt vời và nhân viên cũng rất thân thiện và hỗ trợ. Tôi đã có một buổi sáng tuyệt vời với bữa sáng đa dạng. Bể bơi cũng là một nơi tuyệt vời để thư giãn. Chắc chắn tôi sẽ quay lại đây lần nữa. Khách sạn rất sạch sẽ và nhân viên thân thiện. Đây là một khách sạn tốt, phòng sạch, giá cả hợp lý, họ cung cấp một bữa sáng tự chọn tuyệt vời, nhân viên thân thiện và hỗ trợ. Phòng đẹp, bữa sáng tuyệt vời, giường cực kỳ thoải mái, vị trí tuyệt vời, dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay miễn phí và nhân viên rất hữu ích.

Sự đánh giá tích cực về Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport

Với sự đánh giá tổng thể 8.3 điểm, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách đến Bali, Indonesia. Khách sạn này được đánh giá cao về giá trị với điểm số 8.2, cho thấy đây là một nơi lưu trú tuyệt vời với giá cả hợp lý. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn được đánh giá 8.0 điểm về tiện nghi, cho thấy khách sạn này có đầy đủ các tiện nghi hiện đại và đáp ứng được nhu cầu của du khách. 

Ngoài ra, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport được đánh giá cao về vệ sinh với điểm số 8.2. Điều này chứng tỏ khách sạn luôn duy trì môi trường sạch sẽ và thoáng mát để khách hàng có trải nghiệm nghỉ ngơi tốt nhất. Với sự đánh giá 8.8 điểm về vị trí, khách sạn nằm ở vị trí thuận lợi, gần sân bay Ngurah Rai, rất tiện cho du khách đến và đi từ Bali. 

Cuối cùng, đội ngũ nhân viên của Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm số 8.5. Nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình sẽ đảm bảo du khách có một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời và không gặp bất kỳ khó khăn nào trong suốt thời gian lưu trú tại khách sạn. Với những đánh giá tích cực như vậy, Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời ở Bali.

sample_comments.text: Dù là đến Bali hay sắp rời đi, đây là khách sạn rất phù hợp. Vị trí và cơ sở vật chất của khách sạn thương hiệu không có gì để chê, và hồ bơi rất lớn và tiện lợi, nóng là xuống bơi một chút. Dịch vụ khách sạn cũng rất làm hài lòng, mọi người đều rất nhiệt tình. Bữa sáng phong phú và ngon, xứng đáng được khen ngợi. Tuy nhiên, cảm giác vệ sinh thì bình thường, thảm ở tầng một có mùi ẩm mốc, không mấy dễ chịu, và phong cách thiết bị trong phòng cũng không mới, khá cổ điển. Giá cả hợp lý, tổng thể hài lòng, đáng để ở lại!

Tuy nhiên, với mức giá này mà có thể sử dụng bể bơi và bữa sáng thì tôi nghĩ là rất khó để tìm được nơi nào tốt hơn về mặt giá trị sử dụng.

sample_comments.title: Sconsigliato
sample_comments.text:
Ho aspettato 90 minuti l'autista che doveva venirmi a prendere all'aereoporto nonostante l'hotel si trovi a 4 minuti d'auto dall'aereoporto. Ho chiamato 15 volte l'hotel e di solito nemmeno rispondevano. Strano! Quando sono arrivato c'erano 3/4 staff nella reception e quasi nessun ospite.
L'hotel è datato. Non ho l'acqua calda per fare la doccia, mi sono svegliato e la luce del bagno non si accendeva nemmeno, alcune zone della stanza sono piene di polvere (la lampada non sarà spolverata da vari mesi), lo staff Koa è molto maleducato e guarda i clienti con superficialità e con uno sguardo di superiorità, non è presente nessun manager nella struttura. Dopo avermi fatto aspettare 90 minuti, senza nemmeno scusarsi, la loro unica preoccupazione era come volevo pagare il servizio del pick-up. Ma se ho prenotato una stanza con free airport pick-up perché volete altri soldi? 
Ho pagato di più per avere un upgrade della stanza e alla fine non l'ho ricevuto a quanto pare. L'orologio in camera era sballato di quattro ore.
In questa struttura mancano le basi della hõtellerie. 
Spero solo di riuscire a cancellare la seconda notte e trovare un'altra sistemazione perché Bali è piena di strutture meravigliose con staff gentile e cordiale!

sample_comments.text:
Not recommend to stay this Hilton property.
Pros:
+ It is very near to the airport and good for layover or transit passengers. 
+ restaurant's staff was helpful and friendly.
Cons:
- it is near the airport but no free airport transfer. You need to pay 125k Rp to use the airport transfer .
- you have to carry your luggages by yourself. 
- the reception staff is not friendly and low check-in procedure.
- The room was smelly, dirty and rusty.
- very old architecture.
- the facilities were not clean.
- only onr restaurant in the hotel witb very limited options. It is an open air restaurant with average food.

Tips:
- pay $5 to use the porter service at the airport. They will help you grab all your bags and put them on the bell, and take you to the right check-in counter.
- Using the PassGo Digital Hotel at the 2nd floor of Bali International Terminal for less than 6hrs transit is a better option fof single or couple passengers.

sample_comments.title: If you want to plan near airport it is a decent hotel
sample_comments.text:
If your priority is staying close to the airport, this hotel can be a reasonable choice. We booked it for a short stay before an early morning flight and found the location to be quite convenient. The proximity to the airport helped us avoid long travel times and reduced the stress of navigating traffic before departure.

The hotel itself was decent for a transit stay. The room was comfortable enough for a night's rest, and the basic facilities met our expectations. It may not be a luxury property, but it serves its purpose well for travelers looking for convenience rather than a resort-style experience.

One thing future guests should be aware of is the luggage situation. During our stay, there was little to no assistance available for carrying bags. If you are traveling with multiple suitcases, heavy luggage, elderly family members, or young children, this could be inconvenient. Be prepared to handle your own bags from arrival to departure.

Overall, this hotel works well as a practical airport stopover. Its biggest advantage is the location, while the biggest drawback is the lack of luggage support. As long as you know what to expect and travel accordingly, it can be a suitable option for a short stay near the airport.

sample_comments.title: Premium price for poor quality
sample_comments.text: I simply needed a place to rest our heads during a transit in Bali (not a difficult requirement to satisfy). This hotel was being advertised as being close to the airport, while it's true the transport cost from and to the airport is rather expensive for the going rate in the area. And you couldn't really walk from/to the airport either carrying an infant and a lot of luggage, so be wary about the location advertised for this hotel as there are much better alternatives around. Our flight was delayed and we didn't get to the hotel until 2:30am, the hotel wouldn't give us a late checkout beyond 1pm citing the room is booked for the next day. They made us pay for another smaller room (very inconvenient to have to move when you're travelling with an infant) - which they made us pay pretty much the equivalent for a full night's rate but only for day use (for a few hours). Then when trying to get into the new room, the door wouldn't open. We were made to wait in the hot hallway (all the hallway and common areas are not properly if at all air-conditioned, including the lifts, which is pretty embarrassing for a brandname like Hilton) for a while while they called the engineer to fix the door. All we got was a lousy standard apology for the inconvenience without any form of dispensation for the premium price we paid (the equivalent of 2 nights accommodation) which was only used for a short transit. The aircond in the room was also very warm (the temperature would not go lower than 23'C in both rooms we were in). Room service food was also expensive but not at all nice. Would not recommend and would not return to this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text:
we lost a pack of slippers and beach shoes after leaving our bags with them because we arrived earlier than the check in time and the room wasn't ready yet. so we went to the nearest mall for some lunch instead and came back after a few hours when it was already okay to check in.

my mom was so sure she put the pack of the said things at the bottom of a certain eco bag together with some of our belongings and tied the handle together.

we only came from hilton hotel bali nusa dua that day where we checked in for 5 days, took a gojeck ride to hilton garden inn for closer to airport as we were already flying back to manila the next day. before leaving hilton hotel bali (after checkout), we double checked our bags and everything was there. before we left the gojeck ride, we checked the stuff again and the car compartment if we left anything and everything was there.

then, when we came back from the mall and went to our room, my mom noticed this certain eco bag wasn't tied anymore and that's when we found out the pack of beach shoes and slippers were gone. it was obviously taken intentionally as one pair of slippers were originally packed with it in a big plastic shein package but was left in the eco bag without the package.

we also called hilton hotel bali to check if we left anything in the room because we were trying to give hilton garden inn the benefit of the doubt. like maybe it fell or something but they never found anything.

and besides, my mom had a video of our family that also shows our baggage when we were sitting at the waiting area in hilton garden inn prior checking in, and it clearly showed the particular eco bag all tied up and looking so full. 

anyway, that's a story of our experience. my review is the carpets are dirty, the staff isn't so friendly unlike hilton hotel bali. they look at you with no smiles and the frontdesk was even sarcastic at answering questions

sample_comments.title: Big Disappointment
sample_comments.text: The Hilton Garden Inn use have very nice rooms at a reasonable price, great location next to the airport for pre-departure stays, good service and food and free airport/mall shuttle service. No longer. Price is still reasonable but rooms are worn and a bit dirty, many items in the room needs repair or replacing, service and food substandard and does not meet Hilton standards. Asked to see a manager and was told none on duty. After insisting a Maintenance Manager showed up and was very apologetic. Showed him pictures of mildew around bathroom sink and frayed towels as examples. He did upgrade us to a suite, which was nice, but I do not believe he fully understood our concerns or will take action. Recommend not staying at this Hilton property.

sample_comments.title: 1 night transit in bali
sample_comments.text:
I arrived in Bali at around 11 pm from Sumbawa, to catch an early flight to Jakarta. Location wise the hotel is brilliant. However, the room conditions, facilities was inadequate. I was not provided with coffee/tea nor boiling kettle, hot water was non existent the only time I took my shower.

When I tried to leave the hotel using their "free shuttle" they said their shuttle is full and not available hence I was forced to use a taxi.

This is about my 100th visit to Bali, mostly for leisure. I really don't get as of why people would like to stay in this hotel when they visit Bali. It's probably the cheapest hilton in Bali, but it is also definitely the WORST.

sample_comments.negatives:
The service was very disappointing. They did not allow me to check in early, not even 30 minutes before, while many guests after me were checked in with no problem. At 3:00 PM when I came to take the room key, the receptionist told me: "I was going to let you in earlier but I was too busy." There was no effort at all to make me feel welcomed or valued as a guest.

I also asked about booking a massage, and she just said it was fully booked. The way she spoke was unprofessional, and she added that it is not allowed to bring anyone from outside. Overall, her attitude was not nice at all and the experience was very disappointing.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed and Wouldn't Stay Again
sample_comments.text:
I booked this property as a transit hotel, hoping for a good night's sleep before a long flight the next morning. Unfortunately, the experience was far from restful. 

- The room amenities were very disappointing: towels were worn out, the AC was preset at 22° and left the room uncomfortably hot all night, had few mozzie bits and the shower was leaking. 
- Room dining options were limited, with hardly any healthy food choices available. 
- For the price I paid, I expected Hilton standards, but instead it felt more like an average 2-star hotel. 

The only positive was the breakfast, which offered good variety and quality. 

Overall, I wouldn't choose to stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The staff is willing to help. They will go extra miles to help.
sample_comments.negatives: The bed sheet is not clean. The shower floor is slippery, my husband fell, good thing he didn't get hurt.

sample_comments.title: Not clean and noisy
sample_comments.text: Not too clean there's stinky smell of the rooms and cockroach baby, very noisy can hear beside room very clearly and someone will knock the door out of sudden only lobby looks good but for the rooms really nahh

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Close to airport and friendly staff
sample_comments.negatives: Very dirty had blood spots in toilet

sample_comments.title: Staff mislead
sample_comments.text:
I requested taxi early morning to airport, staff told me the taxi will arrive here in 25 minutes,
He suggested me to use there car, it's ready, it cost 125000.
I said NO , i walked 5 steps to the road and I got taxi straight away. It cost me only 15000.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: We always had to ask for towels and always needed more water.

sample_comments.title: Very average
sample_comments.text: The sound insulation between the room and the room is not good, there are stains on the sheets, not too clean, lying on the itchy, things are not placed fully, the service staff attitude is poor, the only selling point is the room decoration and style, unified standards, other no

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Decent sized rooms. Couldn't hear the busy road from the first floor, but could hear other guests
sample_comments.negatives: Nobody helped to take the luggage up to my room, nobody showed me how to work the key card. No towels in the room, broken kettle, no bin bags in the bins, had to go down to the lobby and ask for towels and a kettle. Waited nearly three hours. Had to then go back down and ask again. In the meantime the door card wouldn't unlock the door. So had to go back down to get the door opened. The staff came up to try to open it, after several failed attempts, they had to call an engineer to fix the door. Even after he fixed the door I still had continuous issues.

sample_comments.title: Not very good.
sample_comments.text: Service was terrible. Facilities were unacceptable. Find another place,

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The poolside was amazing.
sample_comments.negatives:
It felt more like a corporate office, where you have to tap your key fob at every gate.
There were not many vegetarian/vegan options in the breakfast spread and the options that were available were cold/raw. 
I was given a corner room, 2069. The room has a tv but did not have a dth connection, so all you can see is a Hilton video.
Overall the hotel did not look and feel of Bali. It gave a feeling of private corporate offices.

sample_comments.title: Living off the brand... Hmmm
sample_comments.text: I'm not a breakfast person, but in Asia, I love it! Well, until you have brekky here. Disgusting! I'm impressed on how you can make chicken and rice so inedible and dry. It's a true wonder. Drinks overpriced, food poor, staff try their best. Give it a miss. Another rubbish Hilton living off the past.

sample_comments.title: Average stay
sample_comments.positives:
Bed was comfy
Staff were friendly and helpful
Breakfast was great
We stayed only 1 night as we arrived late at night at the airport and needed a place to sleep.
sample_comments.negatives:
The room smelt like cigarettes
Very basic room, the whole place felt like it was a bit outdated.

sample_comments.title: The cashier man
sample_comments.text:
He is not supposed to be a cashier, but OUTSIDE as a gardener maybe. 
He seems to know everything but the way he handles order ignorant.

sample_comments.title: Stayed only waiting for flights
sample_comments.text: We didn't stay long enough to give a proper review however to stay as we did waiting for our flight was good enough

sample_comments.title: Staff is not very welcoming
sample_comments.text: The room was a bit messy and staff at the reception was rude and not accommodating, however the location is good especially if you have late arrival or departure

sample_comments.title: Not clean
sample_comments.text: Our room wasn't very clean: stains on sheets, grime in bathroom, sticky floors.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: We stayed here prior to our departure flight for the location. The facilities were not very clean and the hallway smelled. The room itself was clean. It was affordable fine for the night we stayed there.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text:
-
- no shuttle bus to the airport
- couldn't walk to the airport either as the hotel is located on the other side of the wide street (impossible to cross), so you have to order the grab or taxi
- breakfast is tragic, most of the trays/bowls were empty, also, most of the options are typical as in Asia (noodles, chicken etc.) and none European options 
- the breakfast area was not cleaned at all (dirty dishes, cutlery everywhere)
- dirty plates laying in front of the hotel rooms
- stains on carpets in halls

+
+ swimming pool
+ comfortable bed

Staff was nice & room was clean w/ good shower. The rest was terrible. Bali in general has the worst wifi of any place I've traveled to, and here it didn't work at all. Long lines for check in / check out. When busy don't count on getting served at the restaurant, you will be ignored. This wouldn't have been such a big deal but there is nothing else in walking distance, and no mini mart on the property as the photos would have you believe. Business center was closed as well. Also the bed was hard as a rock. :(

sample_comments.title: Off day for Hilton?
sample_comments.text: I have stayed in several Hiltons before and I'm not sure if they were having an off day. I did request no smoking room, but the hallway was reeking of cigarettes. I also chose garden view room but got the parking lot instead. It is close to the airport so that was convenient. There are many other hotels nearby that I will try next time.

sample_comments.title: Not recommended
sample_comments.text:
My husband and I wanted a hotel near the airport to spend the night before our early morning flight the next day and because this is a Hilton property, we thought it would be a good deal to take it. 
But to our nightmare, the bed was full of bugs and the air conditioner didn't work, it was stuck at 25 degrees all night. We couldn't sleep all night. 
Pathetic experience, would never recommend

sample_comments.title: Soon to be closed
sample_comments.text:
This hotel looks like it is soon to be closed because lack of customer makes lack of income. There is almost nobody else when we visit to stay. 
Room is okay but when we're checking in, thefront staff told us that our reservation doesn't include breakfast. We definetely sure we booked the room + breakfast, so when we showed our reservation from agoda, it is written "with breakfast", and they apologied to us.
The next day, we were suprised because they dont offer buffet restaurant. How could a hotel of Hilton Group only offer 2 breakfast menu choice. Mie goreng and Nasi goreng. And only 1 menu we can get. It also has to order to the waitress to get the food. Then, When we tried to ask for omelette, they look like dont wanna take the order, but at last, they cook us 1 plain omelette even we ordered 2. 
Definetely will stay at Novotel instead of Hilton Garden for the next short stop of flight in Bali.

sample_comments.title: Busy chinese tourist hotel, good location for early flight out
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel but have to say too many chinese group tourist, luckily they all on the same floor.

sample_comments.title: Ok
sample_comments.text: Ok

sample_comments.title: I wouldn't go back
sample_comments.text: The breakfast is limited. I received the room closer to the lounge for handicapped people. Not impressed with facilities. They look old and tired. In saying that other rooms might be different and more upmarket.

sample_comments.title: Horrible
sample_comments.text: Bad experience.

sample_comments.title: Booked Only to Catch Early Flight
sample_comments.text: The room is spacious but old. The only sales point is close to airport.

sample_comments.title: Handy one nigh at airport
sample_comments.text: Hotel is OK , pretty basic bit good for early flights
sample_comments.response: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear that our hotel met your needs for your early flight. While we strive to provide a comfortable experience, we're always looking to improve. If you have any specific suggestions on how we could enhance your stay, please let us know. We hope to see you again!

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: We often sleep hier 1 night due to the distance with airport. But if we hv dinner, we know we hv to see the terrible man (cashier with a little bit latin face...according to my partner). The order is to long waiting. He is ignorant. The menu is just borrrring.

sample_comments.title: Improve your room cleanness
sample_comments.text: I definitely won't come back. We stayed only for a few hours before we decided to leave. The room was dirty (I spotted some hairs on the floor and some yellow stain on the bed sheet, and the room smelled so bad, like pee), and there were no towels in it. After contacting the receptionist twice, they gave me another room. Unfortunately, the new room was also smelly.

sample_comments.title: Don't bother
sample_comments.text: I was told there was a shuttle, but there was not. I walked to the hotel as advertised a 10 minute walk. It took 20 and only half on footpaths. Taxis wanted USD$20. Food very average with limited selection. No battery in remote for TV.

sample_comments.title: No management
sample_comments.text: Taxi did not show up to pick me at airport, then asked driver to take me to a different part of townand when I got him to stop at an ATM he drove off leaving me stranded. Breakfast was not included as the initial room booking I made. Hard to believ Hilton would hang there name on such a shappy, old poorly managed hotel.

sample_comments.title: Not so close to airport
sample_comments.text: If you want to stay there only to be closed to airport.. Better choose cheaper optionn or hotel that located inside airport.. Transportation from airport still cost 100K. The hotel itself looks old and tired.

sample_comments.title: Ambiguous location, lots of room for improvement
sample_comments.text: I transited in Bali for jakarta flight the following morning. I thought hilton garden inn would be in the airport but not. The bed also a bit dirty, lights arrangement is confusing, and incomplete amenities in the room. The worst would be the shower head was dangling cannot hold still

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: The hotel is close to the airport. It is a bit old and run down. There is no hot water for the shower. There is a laundry room facilities that you can do your laundry. It is a nice hotel for one night stay if you have an early flight to catch.

sample_comments.title: Good for one night
sample_comments.text: Only good for staying one night until flight tomorrow. There are no bell boy at the lobby for helping us at all. I think they were short of staff. Hotel is a bit old and dusty. Very noisy, all sound from corridor can be heard clearly in the room. I can say it's not proper if you stay with young children. Only good for couple/solo traveller and for one night only. I expect much as it was hilton group but i prefer budget hotel instead. But the location was good only 5 minutes from airport, good for catching early flight
sample_comments.response:
Dear Erika,
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience about your recent stay at our hotel. We sincerely appreciate your feedback and we are very sorry we did not exceed your expectations. Since Hilton Garden Inn is a focus service as brand standard of Hilton Group, we are sorry there wasn't bellboy upon the arrival. Your comments will help us as we continually work to improve our guest experience. Please contact us if there is anything else we can do for you at this time. We hope you will consider staying with us again in the future. Our goal is to make your stay better and brighter. If something isn't just the way you like it, simply let any Team Member know, and we will make it right.
Sincerely,
Putri Christina

sample_comments.title: Not recommend to friend
sample_comments.text:
Smell of old tobacco ..
Drains not working due to poor drain gradient

sample_comments.title: Good location
sample_comments.text: The flight was so late and we chose this hotel. Perfect for the purpose but the amenities in the room were quite far from expectation. It was pity that the shuttle service stops due to covid

sample_comments.title: The only good thing here is it's proximity to the airport
sample_comments.text: We weren't even assisted by anyone when we arrived. We took it upon ourselves to get the cart and took our bags to our room. The room was dirty with dead cockroach and the beds are not arranged properly, one is even broken. Breakfast buffet is so-so

sample_comments.title: Good location bad hotel
sample_comments.text: Location is good, but the hotel is not well maintain - I think the hotel has been closed for some time due to covid and they are not ready to welcome guest, staffs are less and it is very hot - air condition is not working in most of the area

sample_comments.title: Rundown
sample_comments.text: The room was rundown and needs renovation and refurbishment

sample_comments.title: Perhaps better to remove the Hilton name
sample_comments.text:
Not that near to the airport after all. 
After a flight delay and long queue at immigration all I wanted was to wash up and rest, however it took me 3 attempts and a waiting time of 45 minutes in total to just get a toothbrush. 

No apologies given. But explanation of shortage of staff. That is not my concern but rather a problem of your end about scheduling staff. I don't want to hear your problems because I've got my own. It was 3am and I had an 8am meeting means less than 4 hours to sleep. 

Might as well just be called Garden Inn, as there wasn't any part of Hilton which I felt happy with.

sample_comments.title: The room and corridors had a strong, unpleasant smell of humidity and dampness
sample_comments.negatives: The room and corridors had a strong, unpleasant smell of humidity and dampness --- not the fresh, clean environment you'd expect from a Hilton. It made the stay uncomfortable from the moment I walked in.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Very dirty. For a Hilton chain hotel we were expecting alot better than this. Stay in the Novotel if wanting to be close to the airport. Cant go wrong! And breakfast is wonderful

sample_comments.title: Noisy
sample_comments.positives:
Its convenient after a long flight to just check in, shower and sleep and they offer pick up service which is organized very well. The lady waiting at the airport gives clear instructions and is easy to reach by WhatsApp
Staff is very friendly
sample_comments.negatives: Not in their control but woke up at 5 am on Sunday from people and child stomping like elephants in the room above me for an hour so loudly. I called the reception 5:36 am he was kind and offered to send security up. It was quiet for a while then they stomp again. I got a bad sleep. Hotel is falling apart due to humidity

sample_comments.title: Suitable for short stay during transit
sample_comments.text:
Location is very close to airport with shuttle service to the airport.
Nightly rate is reasonably priced.
However hygiene around restaurant was bad, a lot of flies to the point it was disturbing our dining. Maybe because it was the start of raining season

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Nearest airport
sample_comments.negatives: Bad customer service

sample_comments.title: Stayed one night
sample_comments.text:
We decided to stay at the Hilton Garden Inn just because it was very convenient (close to the airport). We reached at 430PM on the day to be told that our room wasn't ready and that we had to wait another hour when check-in times are at 3PM. The staff then offered to put us into a twin single bed room instead.
We paid around AUD $94 for the room, which doesn't sound like a lot, but it is quite a lot for Bali standards. So we expected a better service from the staffs and yet no one offered to take our luggage up to our room.
The closet smelled like it was a 100 years old, the shower was mouldy too. 
When it came time to sleep, all four of the pillows that were provided in the room had a very bad smell, like wet clothes that didn't dry properly.

Very very disappointed with the service at the Hilton. If you're looking at staying at somewhere close to the airport, there are plenty of other options at half the price!!

sample_comments.title: Great spa, adequate room
sample_comments.positives: Lovely lobby, beautiful pool and spa
sample_comments.negatives: Oddly, there was no hair dryer in the room and no one answered the phone when I pressed the customer service button in the phone. So I needed to go to the front desk. They told me hairdryers were available upon request. This is the first hotel I have ever stayed at where a hairdryer wasn't provided in the room. AND the outlet in the bathroom didn't accommodate a hairdryer, even though there was a holder on the wall for a hairdryer just above the outlet. Finally, the only outlet in the room near a mirror was "loose" so the dryer plug wouldn't stay in the outlet. My husband had to hold the plug in while I dried my hair using a mirror that was so high on the wall that I could only see the top of my head. In the scheme of life not a big deal BUT I expect better from Hilton.

sample_comments.title: Hot, humid and smells mould
sample_comments.text: Stayed for 1 night ground floor garden view. Smell was horrible. Smelt if mould or damp. Was so strong asked to be moved. Couldn't eat in resturant as no air flow, humid and muggy. Even leaving at 4am corridors and lobby was so warm. Extremely disappointed as stayed in Bali for less per night with better accommodation

sample_comments.title: Not an easy airport hotel
sample_comments.positives: Lovely grounds
sample_comments.negatives: Confusing to find. Rooms far from reception and difficult to find. Maintenance issues, leaks in bathroom. Room service was mediocre.

sample_comments.title: Location deceptively inaccessible
sample_comments.text: Looked to be near airport but not walkable. Had to take cab. Other aspects are okay.

sample_comments.title: Dirty
sample_comments.positives: Close to the airport
sample_comments.negatives: Cockroaches everywhere. We booked the hotel last minute due to close proximity to the airport. Upon entering the room we found 3 cockroaches and a mosquito . Ugh. This cannot be HILTON!

sample_comments.title: Lost fitness watch near the pool
sample_comments.text: Lost fitness watch near the pool , calling them multiple times to check on that after check out, they said they will check with the facilities and get back to me , so far after 24 hours no one has called me, totally unprofessional behavior

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: I have stayed in this hotel on many occasions in transit. The location is quite good for transiting. Use the hotel car /shuttle service if offered; now much cheaper than airport taxi official rates.
sample_comments.negatives:
I've stayed in the hotel many times without incident. However, this time:
1. Towels provided were old and fraying. 
2. Hotel had a spare bed in it, making room crowded and giving it a storage room vibe
3. Kettle in room did not work
4. Shower towel rod broken. 
5. TV reception on a few channels not working (could be the cable provider and not hotel). 

I reported all to front desk on departure, but seems to me to be a real slipping in standards from previous visits.

sample_comments.title: カビの匂いで頭痛
sample_comments.text: 客室に入ると頭が痛くなるほどのカビの匂いで悩まされました。次の日のフライトが早かったため空港に近いホテルと思って取りましたが大失敗でした。ロビーやポールサイドでほとんど過ごしていました。空港までも歩いていけるような道路ではないのでもっと選択肢を広げればよかったなと後悔です。

sample_comments.title: Just served it's purpose as a standby area for our flight
sample_comments.positives: Proximity to airport
sample_comments.negatives: Needs to be updated.

sample_comments.title: 공항이랑 가까워요
sample_comments.text:
가격대비 나쁘지 않은 숙소에요. 

다만 커튼에서 냄새가.....ㅠㅠ 많이 나요.. 

수질은 그리 나쁜 편은 아닙니다!

sample_comments.title: Short stay
sample_comments.positives: Short distance from the airport, and a good pool. Breakfast had a good selection.
sample_comments.negatives: The bed covers smell like cigarette, and the smell of damp.and the building is very very cold. Even if adjust the AC, it's too cold.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing experience
sample_comments.text:
Hotel didn't live up to the Hilton name. Our experience was just disappointing.

The hotel felt old and not well-maintained. Room also had a weird smell that was coming from the hallway (which also seemed unclean). To make things worse, calling the front desk was hit-or-miss where about half the time, no one even answered. Although the hotel is close to the airport, it's not really walkable, so the location wasn't as convenient as we hoped.

That said, room is spacious and bathroom had nice toiletries. Though honestly, those small perks weren't enough to overlook everything else.
Overall, the place was a let down. I'd recommend looking elsewhere.

sample_comments.title: Ok for an overnight
sample_comments.positives: Close to airport, good pool, excellent breakfast
sample_comments.negatives: My first room smelled like diesel fuel, the second room they gave me had been smoked in, and the third was fine. No apologies from staff and most hotels would upgrade after two bad rooms. They no longer provide hand towels or face clothes in the rooms, which seems cheap and there were no towels in the gym.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Bad. If you are foreigner, you are accepted by good gesture by the cashier. If you are a local....bye bye, he is ignorant.

sample_comments.title: Location
sample_comments.positives:
Near the airport 
Buffet breakfast was amazing. Lot to choose from.
sample_comments.negatives: Rooms. There was a lizard in our room. Had to ask them to change the rooms.

sample_comments.title: No luggage assistance
sample_comments.text:
I traveled with my 75 year old mother and we stayed one night to catch a connecting flight the next morning. We arrived at 1030 pm and were told they have no bell boy assistance with luggage because they are a "service" hotel. Had to lug 3 suitcases to the room and back (especially difficult esp on the third floor with a carpeted lobby - filthy carpet too). 
Room was a decent size, linen ok. Breakfast adequate. But never staying at a Hilton Garden Inn again.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Location and comfort
sample_comments.negatives: Incompetent unhelpful staff

sample_comments.title: Short Stay
sample_comments.text: No towels in room. No staff to assist with baggage or move luggage around.

sample_comments.title: Not great
sample_comments.positives: The bed was very comfortable and I slept well. It was a short walk to the airport and the facilities were reasonably good - nice pool, good bath products in the shower. Breakfast was decent - good variety. WiFi supported a zoom call without any issues.
sample_comments.negatives: When I arrived my room wasn't ready and I was told it would be ready "in 15 minutes" for a good hour and a half. They said they would come tell me when it was ready but did not, I had to come back and ask again. My bags were not brought up to the room promptly and appeared to be lost for a while. My room had no towels and I had to ask repeatedly for them as none arrived after an hour of waiting. The hotel was clearly busy but no apology or gesture was given. Terrible coffee and "orange juice" that was actually orange squash detracted from an otherwise good breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Untidy, smelly walkways, Better stay at a cheaper hotel
sample_comments.text:
Booked Hilton to get a 4 star hotel experience and since it was very near to the airport. But to our surprise when to walk to the ally towards your room, it is so smelly and the rugs to so old, dusty and looks like very bad condition. 

I found a small cockroach in the room. 

Towels were worn out and had stains on them. We had to as them to replace. 

It was looking worse than a 1 star hotel. 

Only good looking part was the restaurant and the pool.

Room is not worth it.

Cleanliness was an issue.

Rather go for a cheaper hotel and save money than spending more for such a hotel

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Carpet in hallway old and torn

sample_comments.title: Staff good
sample_comments.text:
I have stayed in this hotel 3 times before because it is so convenient to the airport but probably won't stay again.
Last time l stayed here a paid extra for a pool view but they stuck me right at the end a a corridor and there was no view.
This time l paid even more for a suite room but again had a terrible view.
Each time l stayed two nights and expected better.
So it is really only for a one night stay.
There are no restaurants within walking distance and they capitalise on that for overcharging for their in house dining.
So it is a 5/10 from me.

sample_comments.title: Fine for a night
sample_comments.positives: 24hr check in and location close to the airport was great. Also a lovely pool.
sample_comments.negatives: Not enough drinking water available in room, or anywhere to refill water bottles from a central location. Also, no 24 hour room service which is surprising for Hilton.

sample_comments.title: HILTON GARDEN INN'S SLOGAN IS "GIVE LESS'
sample_comments.text:
Whilst the slogan for guest is 'GET MORE" 
HILTON GARDEN INN'S SLOGAN IS "GIVE LESS' 

Amenities listed is FREE SHUTTLE FROM AIRPORT TO HOTEL - that is the reason why I chose it. 

After multiple attempts to call prior to arrival date - with no answer, I sent an email as to how to reserve the shuttle. I only received an answer 1 hour before the time/date of my arrival. The reason was that their customer was closed !! I also tried to get their WHATSAPP contact - both myself and the staff at the hotel in Sorong where I was staying - impossible !!

In their email, it explained that are NO AIRPORT SHUTTLE and I can arrange for a hotel taxi for 125,000 IDR. It too late to order so I had to take a private taxi for 150,000 IDR.

There was NO PORTERS TO HELP WITH LUGGAGE.

I tried the SPA for a 2 hour session - 1 hour for head/shoulder/ neck massage and 1 hour for ALEO VERA BODY MASSAGE. The girl assigned to me do not understand English. I tried to tell her that I want the head massage first - she insisted to start from the feet. Another girl was brought in - AFTER 15 MINUTES OF DISCUSSION - the second girl finally understood. Head massage was ok. ALOE VERA BODY MASSAGE constituted just rubbing ALOE VERA over my body - NOT MASSAGE. This was a disaster and not work the money. 

When I left the next morning - THERE WAS AGAIN NO PORTER TO HELP WITH LUGGAGE. I was told by the attending staff 'THAT THEY DO NO OFFER PORTERS TO HELP WITH LUGGAGE'

DO NOT STAY IN THIS HOTEL !!

sample_comments.title: Would not stay in hotel again
sample_comments.positives: Airport location
sample_comments.negatives: Promote it as being a "garden inn". My room had a view of dead vines, clinging to a wall. Leaking bathroom accessory, no stopper in the sink and the shower appeared to be unclean with discolored grouting or mold. Awakened to an insect running across bathroom wall.

sample_comments.title: Traveller
sample_comments.text:
Far too expensive and a long way from anywhere.
No cafes or beaches within walking distance.

sample_comments.title: Would not stay again
sample_comments.positives: Location to airport
sample_comments.negatives: Promoted as "garden inn". My room had view of dead vines hanging on wall. Leaking toilet accessory, shower appeared to be unclean, broken stopper in sink. Found bug climbing bathroom wall during the night.

sample_comments.title: Ok
sample_comments.text: The Standard Hotel is conveniently located near the airport but does not offer an airport shuttle service. The pool area is nice, although the depth of 1.2 meters might be a limitation for some guests. The staff is delightful, providing excellent service throughout the stay. The restaurant at the hotel is really good, offering delicious meals. The decor of the hotel is pleasant, but there are cleanliness issues, especially in the bathroom where it was dirty and the shower had issues with draining properly, often being clogged with hair and sludge. The location of the hotel is not ideal as it is far from shopping areas and the beach, and it's not easy to walk to nearby attractions.

sample_comments.title: Pro and cons
sample_comments.text:
Close to airport.
Corridor to rooms featured blistered and flaking paint along the walls.
The bathroom sink surround was cracked and ageing.
One soap dispenser had dropped off the wall and lay on pieces on the floor.
There was the smell of a backed up lavertory in the bathroom. 
The lighting switches seemed random. It seemed odd that the Hotel is marketed under the Hilton name.
The restaurant was fine and the staff attentive.

sample_comments.title: A bit run down
sample_comments.text:
The room has a moldy smell.
Very basic room facilities and poor toiletries, poor soundproofing.
Nice pool and is close to the airport but sadly no shuttle bus is available so for the 2km distance, our taxi fee paid is 120 Rp around 8usd.

sample_comments.title: Faded Bali
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is not bad and the pool is very nice for length swimming during a stopover. 

However no hotel should have moldy carpets, with a bad smell, as in the hallway of this hotel.

It would be very easy just to rip out the old carpet and put in a tile floor. Problem solved. Would take 1 week max. 

But this hotel can't seem to pull it together. 

Sorry! Would not recommend based on moldyhallway carpets.

sample_comments.title: Good Location, But Service and Room Quality Need Improvement
sample_comments.text:
We booked this hotel mainly for its proximity to the airport, and while the location and overall property are good, there were several areas of concern during our stay.

The housekeeping was below expectations. The room we were allotted was not well maintained---the linen was of poor quality, the bed was torn, and there was a persistent musty smell in the room.

At check-in, the front desk staff were not very polite. Despite requesting just a 20-minute early check-in (as we were traveling continuously with children), we were initially denied, being told the rooms were still being prepared. Only after multiple requests were we asked to wait five minutes and then given a room.

Our booking included dinner and breakfast, but during dinner we were informed that our meal plan had a spending limit of IDR 750,000. Anything above that would be charged separately. This condition was not clearly mentioned during the booking process and came as an unpleasant surprise.

sample_comments.title: Convenient Location, but Odour Issues Let It Down - Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport
sample_comments.text:
The Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport is conveniently located near the airport, making it a practical choice for travelers needing a quick transit stay. We arrived a bit early for check-in, and the front desk staff were kind enough to grant us access to our room right away, which we greatly appreciated.

However, our experience was marred by some significant issues. Our ground-floor room overlooked the carpark, which wasn't ideal, but the real problem was the overwhelming smell. The hallway leading to the room had a strong, unpleasant odour, and the carpet was heavily stained, which didn't inspire confidence. Inside the room, while it appeared clean, there was a persistent musty smell---a mix of old smoke and what reminded us of damp socks. It made staying in the room quite uncomfortable.
Thankfully, the dining experience was a bright spot. We ate at the hotel's dining area, where the food was tasty and satisfying. The standout was Budi, a member of the serving staff, who was exceptionally professional, friendly, and attentive. His warmth and service made the meal a highlight and salvaged the experience for us. Well done, Budi!

Unfortunately, despite the convenient location and great service from staff like Budi, the odour issues in the room and hallway were significant drawbacks. 
Would we stay here again? Regrettably, no, unless the hotel addresses these issues. I hope management takes steps to improve the air quality and overall condition of the rooms to match the otherwise positive aspects of the property.

sample_comments.title: staff good at bargaining with customers
sample_comments.text:
We booked this hotel because we have a late arrival flight. We requested a free pick up service at the airport and also provided the flight no. to them for easy arrangement. It turned out they couldn't arrange a pick up service for us due to their negligence to check the request box. We needed to walk about 15 mins to get to the hotel. When we complained about the service, the staff who proceeded our check-in said we shouldn't expect any pick up service as they didn't reply. I don't understand why we were the one to got blamed as they don't reply us at all!!! We were not expected too much from them but a 4-star hotel should have got better arrangements and services.

Another staff know about the situation and told us they were sorry and would like to upgrade our rooms which was great. 

However, when we told them we also booked this hotel on the last day we stay in Bali, and we would like to book the free shuttle service around 5am. They told us the shuttle service only available from 7am. We understood the limitation of the service and didn't ask for any unreasonable arrangement of that. Unexpectedly the staff told us he could arrange early shuttle service for us, but no upgrade for the rooms for this stay. It's kind of awarkard that a hotel staff bargaining with the customers like this. We were so upset about the attitude and service there. And all apologies seems means nothing at this hotel. So we decided to cancel the last night stay here and booked another hotel rooms even the room price is higher.

sample_comments.title: 가격만 따진다면 추천합니다.
sample_comments.text:
전반적으로 나쁘진 않아요.
직원들도 친절하고 특히 수영장은 시설도 좋고 물도 따뜻하며 엄청 넓고 좋습니다. 공항과의 거리나 시내까지도 그리 멀지 않아 괜찮구요.

다만 객실 복도에서부터 꿉꿉한 냄새가 나며, 객실 내에서도 계속해서 납니다. 복도가 꽤 긴데 환기가 되지 않는것 같고, 날씨 특성상 곰팡이도 꽤 있어요. 그걸 가리려고 한건진 모르겠으나 환기가 안되는 복도에서 페인트 작업을 하고있어서 냄새가 빠지지 않았구요.
다음으로 객실에도 창문이 없어서 환기가 안됩니다. 에어컨은 작동이 되는건지 잘 모르겠고 비가 오지 않았는데도 침구류며 공기며 꿉꿉하고 습합니다. 
세탁, 건조기도 유료로 이용했는데 건조기는 한 번으로는 다 안마르더라구요. 각각 한 번당 75k씩 입니다. 
이건 나라 특성상 어쩔 수 없는것인지 모르겠지만 개미도 꽤 봤어요.

썩 만족스러웠던것은 아니나 가격 생각하면 용인 가능한 수준이었습니다. 수영장 많이 이용하시거나, 관광때문에 잠만 잘곳이 필요하다 하시면 추천드려요. 직원은 어딜 가도 친절했습니다.

sample_comments.title: Nice pool, poor arrival experience
sample_comments.text:
We'll start with the positives: the outdoor pool is very nice, long, well maintained, and definitely one of the best aspects of the property.

Now to the negative points. We arrived in Bali at 1 am and had booked the hotel shuttle in advance. It would have cost us €6.50 to travel less than 2 km, which is obviously expensive, but given the late hour we preferred to avoid the hassle of negotiating with taxi drivers.

Unfortunately, the whole point of booking the shuttle to avoid problems failed. While we were stuck in a long immigration queue, the driver had messaged us, but when we finally came out, he was not there. He had left the sign with my name near the Hilton Garden sign and was absent. When he returned, we then had to argue with another group who claimed they were supposed to take our shuttle. This was not really the driver's fault, as he was clearly trying hard to manage everyone, but the service was disorganized and not at all what we had booked it for.

By the time we arrived at the hotel, it was almost 2 am. We were given a ground-floor room, and when I asked whether it was possible to have one on an upper floor, I was told none were available. We then walked down a corridor full of signs warning about construction works in at least half of the rooms nearby. At that point I went back to reception, because it was already 2:30 am and we obviously wanted to be able to sleep the following morning.

At first, I was told they would ask the workers to start at 11 am. When I asked whether they were seriously telling me that the construction would not begin before 11, I finally got moved to a first-floor room and was also offered a late check-out until 1 pm.

One final issue: both rooms and the corridors smelled of mould.

Overall, the pool is lovely, but the arrival experience and room allocation were handled quite poorly.

sample_comments.title: Not a Hilton experience for sure
sample_comments.text:
The rooms were clean and well maintained. Staff was courteous.

But our stay was marred by unprofessional behaviour of staff, including the manager. 

During check-in at 6pm we were told our room wasn't ready. Asked to wait in the lounge and were told we'd be informed as soon as room was ready. 

Almost an hour passed by with no updates. We reached out to the front desk and were told the room was now ready. Why didn't anyone reach out then?

Drag the bags to the room, and the room door wouldn't open. Multiple follow ups with staff and 30 mins later, no resolution. Just finger pointing at different departments.

Finally asked to speak to the manager who gave us a different room immediately (we were told rooms were fully booked and none were free, hence the original delay in check in). Turns out to be a lie. 

Lastly, manager made empty promises about arranging a taxi at their cost to the airport or hosting us for dinner. Later at dinner, we were promptly presented with a bill before we could eat anything. We paid on the spot, purely to not deal with the staff and manager any longer.

sample_comments.text: If you're flight is early in the morning, this is the best place to stay without the hassle of travelling and you can have extra hours of sleep without rushing. The bed and pillows are very comfy. It is located like 5mins away from the airport.

sample_comments.title: Great place
sample_comments.text: Value for money. If you want to stay near the airport this is probably the best place to be but a bit far from everything else.

sample_comments.title: Transit Stay in Hilton Garden Inn Bali
sample_comments.text: The Hotel really needs upgrade. Fixtures are falling apart in the rooms. In my bathroom the towel hanger fell off. The shower is not easy to use.

sample_comments.title: Great location for a layover
sample_comments.text: Family of 5 stayed in 2 rooms. We had an overnight stay with an early morning flight to Lombok. This was a perfect 5 min location from the airport. Transfer was only 125k idr. Overall the hotel was fine and clean for our needs. We came back otw home and use the pool for 5 hours for only 250k idr. We will def come back if we have another long layover.

sample_comments.title: Amazing long layover location next to the airport
sample_comments.text: Family of 5 stayed in 2 rooms. We had an overnight stay with an early morning flight to Lombok. This was a perfect 5 min location from the airport. Transfer was only 125k idr. sample_comments.title: Very good

sample_comments.title: Served my pupose
sample_comments.text: Will use again as a quick airport hotel

sample_comments.title: Overnight Stay
sample_comments.text: Convenient for airport, but need a taxi for the 10 minute ride. Looking a bit tired, no hot water in the shower, and after that discovered no towels. Call to housekeeping eventually sorted.Only stayed here because Novotel was fully booked.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: great position for late flights in and out of Bali and well priced. not sure if you would want to stay there for more days as not really walking distance to shops and restaurants

sample_comments.title: Rip of drinks
sample_comments.text: I stayed here for 2 nights with my family, while the resort, rooms and facilities are great the thing that let's it down is poor service and ridiculously expensive drink prices, they want $9 for a Bintang and $6 dollars for a small bottle of water. We had dinner and asked for some table water and was refused, so we had to buy a $6 bottle of water, this it outrageous, because of this reason I would not ever return. The service was also very poor.

sample_comments.title: Decent
sample_comments.text: The property was clean and facilities were great. Only one chair in the room so it wasn't possible for two people to sit and have toon service. Great toiletries and sheets. Breakfast starts at 7am so skipped it so we won't kiss our flight. Best to stay on Kuta or Séminyak as there are lots to do and the Grab/taxi rates are the same to the airport anyway.

sample_comments.title: Airport Hotel for Quick Transfer
sample_comments.text:
I spent a night at the Hilton Garden Inn Bali Ngurah Rai Airport before my flight. 

The room was satisfactory with a comfy bed,and had an uninspiring view.

All staff was friendly and helpful, assisting me with arranging a motorbike rental. Their professionalism and courtesy were commendable.Vidi was good as his job

The hotel features a nice outdoor pool, but the restaurant was disappointing with a limited menu and bland food, many items were unavailable. The breakfast buffet was decent, but I wished they had more options for non-locals.

The hotel's location is convenient for travelers flying in or out of the airport, just a few minutes away.

In summary, I'd recommend this hotel for a short, convenient stay near the airport.

sample_comments.title: Okay for a stay or two to fly out
sample_comments.text: Good for a flight transit,room was fine,bed was too hard for me.Breakfast was very good. Wifi keep droping out

sample_comments.title: Great Location for an airport stay
sample_comments.text: This is a handy hotel if you just needed a place to stay that's conveniently close to the airport. Very nice pool and very clean rooms. Though wifi was very weak in the rooms as opposed to public areas.

sample_comments.title: Decent value for money
sample_comments.text: 15 minute walk to the airport, clean rooms, helpful staff. Overall, a good experience.

sample_comments.title: 5 days stay
sample_comments.text: We had booked this hotel at the very last minute as we had a terrible experience with Teluh Bebek Private Villa. The room in Hilton was big enough for 4 of us ( 3 of us slept in the kind bed) was able to put a spare bed for my teenager son. Besides it don't expect much. The water heater was not that hot although it was manageable. The buffet breakfast cost about $15 per pax and there was not much choices and personally I would not recommend it. You rather order via grab food which is much cheaper and you have much more choices. Went to their spa for massage once for $40 was ok. Their swimming pool was decent. But do expect a lot of mosquitos so be prepared with mosquito patches for kids and adults. They also have big flies which is a common thing in Bali. The pros are they are just about 10mins away to the airport if there is no traffic. Overall if you are a fuss free person then this is one of the hotels you can consider.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Location Is very near airport which is great. but standards not up to typical Hilton. Hotel was full, they ran out of towels.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: The hotel is just nice for a short stay. The locations not very strategic as its quite far from the shops. Since our flight is quite late therefore we decided to stay at this hotel for a night. And the cleanliness of the hotel can be improved.

sample_comments.title: Below mediocre but close to airport
sample_comments.text: I only stayed for a few hours since I had a night flight. But in that time, I got frustrated. First, my key card wasn't working well so I basically got locked out of my room. I called the hotel main phone number from my cell phone but it rang multiple times and no one answered. I waited around a bit till I saw a staff person. She was able to get my card to work but also said that she'd call to get the engineer to fix it. No engineer came so the key card was a nuisance for the duration of my stay. Then, when I went to the restaurant I was informed there was a large party before me and the wait was 40 minutes. This was incredibly irritating also. Lastly, the hotel no longer offers a free airport shuttle, which was misleading with the hotel description. There is a transportation service desk which can book an airport transfer but this is paid by the individual customer. The fee is inexpensive. However, when I book a hotel with an airport shuttle, I factor my cost savings for airport transportation when booking this type of hotel. The staff were nice but my issues weren't really resolved.

sample_comments.title: Not really a Hilton
sample_comments.text: Ok for a stopover between flights. Longer than that there are better options

sample_comments.title: Probably the last option
sample_comments.text:
Location is near the airport, that's the main point. Clean room, yes. 
Thankful for early check in since we have super early flight at the following day.

Will come back? Nah..! (But if it's really really really the last available option, then sadly - no choice).

IMHO Don't expect much though it's under Hilton.

The first room they gave us didn't have safety box, so have to call and ask for another room. And... only after some time - since they have to get the confirmation from their tech dep (or something like that), they 'believe us' and asked us to go back to lobby and collect another key. 
We thought the room replacement would be somewhere nearby, but no!
The 'new' room is located in the other wing, and nearer to lobby.

So we wasted our time of dragging our 3 luggages here and there by ourselves due to their error. 
NOTE: No bellboy / staff helped us at all - probably they are lack of manpower (?).

Another thing to note:
There is no airport shuttle - which is not tally with the information provided in their description. 
According to them, they don't have it anymore since covid. (So, why no one bother to update it?! Very misleading).

Initially we booked this hotel because it's near to airport and they stated that they have FREE airport shuttle. 
In the end we spent more $ for airport transfer! 
May as well get another better hotel tbh!!

So.. dear fellow traveller - if you happen to book this hotel, I do hope you have better experience than what I had experience.

sample_comments.title: Convenient
sample_comments.text:
Poor signage to hotel. Needs to improve.
After customs keep left, walk 70 m, follow sign to Singha Hotel (left turn), 50 m then right down a ramp to an undercover garage like walkway 50 m, then up a ramp 2 flights, to the upper level then hotel entry to left. 

Small coffee machine at the breakfast, struggling to keep up. Otherwise reasonable breakfast.
